artPrompt: A small goblin in a torn, melting hazmat suit wades knee-deep through bubbling toxic runoff, visor cracked and fogged, a leaking canister clutched in scrawny hands as sickly bioluminescent vapor curls around it. Rusted pipes and crumbling concrete recede into a bruised stormy haze behind. Tense low film-still framing of doomed cleanup at the reservoir, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Hazmat Goblin
text: When Hazmat Goblin dies, it deals 1 damage to each creature an opponent controls. (The suit was supposed to prevent this.)
flavorText: Cleanup crew, day one. There was no day two.
